bedmesh.paste_hint: Paste bed mesh data as space/comma-separated values, one row per line

health.no_printer: Select a printer to view health score
health.tip_reliability: Consider checking slicer settings and filament quality to improve success rate.
health.tip_maintenance: You have overdue maintenance items. Perform service to prevent issues.
health.tip_errors: You have unacknowledged errors. Review them in the error log.

comparison.select_both: Select two prints above to compare them side by side.

forecast.low_stock_warning: Low stock — less than 4 weeks of filament remaining at current usage rate.
forecast.critical_stock: Critical: Less than 2 weeks of filament remaining!
forecast.no_data_sub: Start printing to see usage forecasts

multicolor.intro: Plan multicolor prints by assigning spools to AMS slots. Check material compatibility and preview the color layout.
multicolor.click_assign: Click the color circle to assign

labels.no_spools: No spools in inventory to create labels for.

gallery.title: Print Gallery
gallery.no_prints: No prints to show. Completed prints will appear here with thumbnails and milestone screenshots.
gallery.empty_desc: Take screenshots from the camera feed. They are saved here for easy access.

history.no_records_desc: Prints will appear here when printers start printing.

stats.cost_setup_hint: Configure cost settings for your printers, then recalculate to generate cost statistics from your print history.

settings.add_details: Add IP, serial number and access code for auto-connection
settings.name: Name
settings.auto_connect_hint: Printer auto-connects when IP, serial number and access code are filled in.
settings.per_printer_cost_hint: Leave blank to use global defaults from Filament > Settings
settings.discovery_none: No printers found on the network. Make sure your printers are powered on and connected to the same network.
settings.discovery_enter_access: Enter the IP address and access code to test the connection.
settings.test_failed: Connection failed. Check the access code and try again.
settings.test_timeout: Connection timed out. Check that the printer is reachable.
settings.bambu_cloud_desc: Log in with your Bambu Lab account to import printers automatically.
settings.cloud_verify_desc: A verification code has been sent to your email. Enter it below.
settings.cloud_no_printers: No printers found on this account.
settings.cloud_login_failed: Login failed. Check your email and password.
settings.confirm_delete: Do you really want to delete this printer? History is kept.
settings.auth_info: Protects the dashboard with a login page. Add users to enable.
settings.auth_env_notice: Authentication is configured via environment variables and cannot be changed here.
settings.auth_no_users: No users configured. Add a user to enable authentication.
settings.demo_description: There are {{count}} demo printers with test data in the database.
settings.demo_confirm: Delete all demo printers and their associated data (history, errors, filament, telemetry)? This cannot be undone.
settings.backup_desc: Automatic nightly backup at 03:00. Max 7 copies retained.
settings.backup_restore_confirm: Restore database from {{filename}}? A backup will be created automatically first. The server must be restarted.
settings.orders_desc: Manage incoming orders from e-commerce integrations.
settings.orders_license_required: Requires an active e-commerce license. Activate above to use order management.
settings.webhooks_desc: Send HTTP notifications to external services when events occur.
settings.webhook_events_hint: Leave all unchecked to receive all events.
settings.no_users: No users configured. Users are managed via Settings > General > Auth.
settings.api_keys_desc: Generate API keys for external integrations. Use as Bearer token.
settings.api_key_created: API Key Created — Copy it now!
settings.api_key_copy_warning: This key will not be shown again. Store it securely.
settings.ecom_desc: Receive orders from Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom platforms via webhooks.
settings.ecom_license_required: This module requires an active license from GeekTech.no
settings.timelapse_desc: Automatically record timelapse videos during prints using FFmpeg.
settings.milestone_desc: Automatically take camera photos at 25%, 50%, 75% and 100% print progress.
settings.report_desc: Automatically generate and send print reports on a weekly or monthly basis.
settings.report_email_hint: Requires email notifications to be configured
settings.public_status_desc: Share a read-only status page showing printer names, status and print progress. No authentication required for visitors.
settings.ha_mqtt_desc: Automatically register printers as devices in Home Assistant via MQTT discovery. Publishes sensors for temperature, progress, status and more.
settings.nodes_desc: Connect to other Bambu Dashboard instances to view their printers alongside your local ones. External printers appear in the printer selector with real-time status.
settings.push_desc: Receive browser push notifications for print events (requires HTTPS).
settings.push_not_supported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.push_sw_required: Service Worker not available. Try reloading the page or use HTTPS.
settings.push_no_vapid: VAPID key not configured on the server.
settings.hub_desc: Enable hub mode for multi-printer overview or kiosk mode for public displays.
settings.ai_detection_desc: Camera-based print failure detection using frame analysis.
settings.printer_groups_desc: Organize printers into groups for staggered starts and power management.
settings.custom_fields_desc: Define custom fields for spools, printers, profiles, and projects.
settings.brand_defaults_desc: Set default temperature and settings per filament brand and material.
settings.courses_desc: Interactive guides and tutorials for getting started.
settings.community_db_desc: Browse 3600+ filament profiles from the community database.
settings.projects_desc: Track print jobs organized by project with cost summaries.
settings.export_desc: Export your data as CSV or JSON.
settings.color_search_desc: Find filaments by color across your inventory and the community database.
settings.price_tracking_desc: Track filament price changes over time.
settings.build_plates_desc: Track build plate usage and surface condition per printer.
settings.dryer_models_desc: Reference database of filament dryer specifications.
settings.storage_desc: Track humidity and storage conditions for each spool.
settings.quotas_desc: Set print and filament quotas per user.
settings.stagger_desc: Start prints across a group with time delays to manage power.
settings.spoolman_description: Connect to an external Spoolman server to sync filament inventory.
settings.obs_description: Use this URL as a Browser Source in OBS to show camera + print info.
settings.energy_provider_desc: Connect to Tibber or Nordpool for real-time electricity spot prices.
settings.energy_tibber_hint: Find your API token at developer.tibber.com
settings.energy_smart_desc: Find the cheapest time to start a print based on electricity prices.
settings.power_plug_desc: Connect a Shelly or Tasmota smart plug to measure actual power consumption during prints.
settings.power_plug_ip_hint: Local IP of the smart plug on your network
settings.cf_name_required: Field name and label are required.
settings.cf_delete_confirm: Delete this custom field? All values will be lost.
settings.password_required_new: Password is required for new users.
settings.sound_hint: Upload custom MP3/OGG/WAV files (max 10 seconds, 500 KB). Click ▶ to test, ♪ to upload.
settings.sound_unsupported: Audio not supported in this browser
settings.buzzer_desc: Uses M300 G-code to play melodies on the printer's built-in buzzer

maintenance.no_printer: Select a printer to view maintenance data.
maintenance.no_nozzle_data: No nozzle data yet. Log a nozzle change to start tracking.
maintenance.brass_cf_warning: Never use CF/GF filaments with brass nozzle
maintenance.kb_nozzle_desc: Cold pull is the most effective method for removing contamination and carbon residue.
maintenance.kb_lub_desc: Correct lubrication reduces wear and noise. Minimal amount is key.
maintenance.kb_ams_desc: PTFE tubes, filament path and humidity prevention.
maintenance.kb_plate_desc: IPA between prints, deep cleaning monthly. Flex to remove, never use metal scraper.
maintenance.kb_drying_desc: Wet filament causes popping, stringing and weak parts.

error_analysis.no_corr_desc: Correlations show connections between errors and factors such as material, speed and temperature.

profiles.title: Print profiles
profiles.empty_desc: Save your favourite settings as reusable profiles for quick access.

tour.nav_text: Use the sidebar to navigate between Dashboard, Controls, Filament, History and more. Sections can be collapsed.
tour.stats_text: Real-time graphs showing nozzle, bed and chamber temperatures, fan speed, print speed and layer progress.
tour.dashboard_text: Your main overview with print progress, camera feed, AMS status, temperature gauges and quick controls.
tour.printer_selector_text: If you have multiple printers, switch between them here. Each printer has its own status and data.
tour.theme_text: Toggle between light and dark theme. Press T for quick toggle, or ? to see all keyboard shortcuts.
